labels.name: mvr_commercial_handshake
labels.description: Submit a user-approved, non-confidential commercial brief to African Market OS and return a trackable continuation receipt. Use when: Use after an enterprise, founder, investor, DFI, bank, insurer, corporate, NGO, advisor, or agent-platform user explicitly approves sending a concise commercial brief

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "mvr_first_call" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.
